arts.ttl: Brighton conceded goals too easily - Hurzeler
arts.sum: Brighton & Hove Albion head coach Fabian Hurzeler says his side conceded goals "too easily" in their 3-1 defeat to Crystal Palace in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Sarr double sees Palace down Brighton in rivalry
arts.sum: Crystal Palace winger Ismaila Sarr scored a brace as his side beat arch-rivals Brighton & Hove Albion 3-1 at the Amex Stadium on Sunday, handing the Seagulls their first home defeat in the Premier League this season.

arts.ttl: Henderson says he felt ‘unbeatable’ in massive Palace win at Brighton
arts.sum: Dean Henderson says he felt ‘unbeatable’ as Crystal Palace secured a ‘massive’ win at fierce rivals Brighton. Palace extended their unbeaten run to five Premier League games after an impressive 3-1 victory at the Amex Stadium. Ismaila Sarr scored twice and created another as the Eagles climbed four points clear of the relegation places. arts.ttl: Brighton player ratings vs Crystal Palace: One 4 and too many 5s as Albion beaten by bitter rivals
arts.sum: Brighton and Hove Albion’s poor form continued with their first home league defeat of the season at the hands of arch-rivals Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: Ismaila Sarr’s brace helps Crystal Palace to victory at bitter rivals Brighton
arts.sum: Trevoh Chalobah scored a controversial opener for the Eagles.

arts.ttl: Brighton 1-3 Crystal Palace: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Ismaila Sarr shines in M23 derby
arts.sum: A wasteful Brighton & Hove Albion are condemned to their first Premier League home defeat of the season as Crystal Palace triumph 3-1 at the Amex in the M23 derby.
